title: Tier-3 College Student Earns ₹24 LPA Without IIT
description:
Most people think high salaries come from IITs, brand names, or luck.

This story proves otherwise.

A Tier-3 college student shared on Reddit how he went from earning ₹25,000 per month to ₹24 lakh per year in just two years, without an IIT degree or campus placement.

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/
